    Class Material

    The material appearance of a primitive.

    Inheritance
    object
    JsonSerializable

    Namespace: Aspose.CAD.FileFormats.GLB
    Assembly: Aspose.CAD.dll
    Syntax
    public sealed class Material : LogicalChildOfRoot, IExtraProperties, IChildOf<GlbData>

    Properties

    Name Description
    Alpha

    Gets or sets the AlphaMode.
    AlphaCutoff

    Gets or sets the AlphaCutoff value.
    It needs to be used in combination with Alpha = MASK.
    Channels

    Gets a collection of MaterialChannel elements available in this Material instance.
    DoubleSided

    Gets or sets a value indicating whether this Material will render as Double Sided.
    Default value: False
    IndexOfRefraction

    Gets or sets the index of refraction.
    Unlit

    Gets a value indicating whether this Material instance has Unlit extension.

    Methods

    Name Description
    DeserializeProperty(string, ref Utf8JsonReader)

    Reads the properties of the current instance from a System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonReader.
    FindChannel(string)

    Finds an instance of MaterialChannel
    GetLogicalChildren()

    Gets a collection of ExtraProperties instances stored by this object.
    InitializePBRMetallicRoughness(params string[])

    Initializes this Material instance with PBR Metallic Roughness attributes.
    InitializePBRSpecularGlossiness(bool)

    Initializes this Material instance with PBR Specular Glossiness attributes.
    InitializeUnlit()

    Initializes this Material instance with Unlit attributes.
    OnValidateContent(ValidationContext)
    SerializeProperties(Utf8JsonWriter)

    Writes the properties of the current instance to a System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonWriter.
